◦ Running gh api repos/example/project/pulls/123/comments

  Would you like to run the following command?

  Reason: Fetch pull request comments through GitHub.

  $ gh api repos/example/project/pulls/123/comments

› 1. Yes, proceed (y)
  2. Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `gh api` (p)
  3. No, and tell Codex what to do differently (esc)
